name: code2prompt
description: Code2Prompt is a powerful command-line tool that simplifies the process of providing context to Large Language Models (LLMs) by generating a comprehensive Markdown file containing the content of your codebase. ⭐ If you find Code2Prompt useful, consider giving us a star on GitHub! It helps us reach more developers and improve the tool. ⭐
summaryZh: Code2Prompt is a powerful command-line tool that simplifies the process of providing context to Large Language Models (LLMs) by generating a comprehensive Markdown file containing the content of your codebase. ⭐ If you find Code2Prompt useful, consider giving us a star on GitHub! It helps us reach more developers and improve the tool. ⭐  它主要面向代码场景，适合做 AI 编程助手、代码生成或自动修复。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做 AI Coding、代码审核、开发提效产品的团队。
